executives.name: Ammar Al-Joundi
executives.background: Mr. Al-Joundi was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Agnico Eagle in February 2022. He previously served as President from 2015 to 2022 and as Chief Financial Officer from 2010 to 2012 and 2015. He has over 20 years of experience in finance and business strategy in the mining industry.

executives.name: Jamie Porter
executives.background: Mr. Porter was appointed Executive Vice-President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer in May 2023. Prior to joining Agnico Eagle, he served as Chief Financial Officer of Alamos Gold Inc. for 11 years.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice-President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer

board_of_directors.name: Sean Boyd
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Boyd is the Executive Chair of the Board of Agnico Eagle. He served as Chief Executive Officer from 1998 to 2022 and has been with the company since 1985. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey Parr
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Parr is the Vice-Chair of the Board. He was previously the Chair of the Board of Kirkland Lake Gold Ltd. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Leona Aglukkaq
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Aglukkaq is a former Canadian politician who served as a Member of Parliament and held several cabinet positions, including Minister of Health and Minister of the Environment.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Sustainable Development Committee

sources.source_description: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited Proxy Statement (DEF 14A) filed March 22, 2024
